UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user of the Harvest Haven platform, including property owners and administrators. Contains profile information and application-specific roles.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

phoneNumber.description: The user's profile phone number used for direct contact from listings.

registrationDate.description: The date and time when the user registered.

role.description: The application-specific role of the user.

Amenity.title: Amenity
Amenity.description: Represents a specific amenity or feature that a property can offer.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Amenity entity.

description.description: A brief description explaining what the amenity is.

Property.title: Property
Property.description: Represents a farmhouse or resort property listed on the Harvest Haven website.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Property entity.

ownerId.description: Reference to the UserProfile of the owner.

ownerPhoneNumber.description: The contact phone number of the owner, pulled directly from their profile phone number.

title.description: A concise and engaging title for the property listing.

description.description: A detailed description of the property.

city.description: The city where the property is located.

stateProvince.description: The state or province where the property is located.

country.description: The country where the property is located.

pricePerNight.description: The price to book the property for one night.

squareFootage.description: The total square footage or area of the property.

amenityIds.description: References to Amenities available at the property.

photoUrls.description: An array of URLs or base64 strings pointing to images of the property.

listingStatus.description: The current status of the property listing.

submissionDate.description: The date and time when the property was submitted.

rating.description: The average rating for the property.

definition.description: Stores properties submitted by a specific owner.
Stores APPROVED property listings that are publicly visible.

firestore.reasoning: Standard structure for user profiles and property listings with denormalized owner contact info.
